recommendations.title: The Chorus
recommendations.overview: In 1940s France, a new teacher at a school for disruptive boys gives hope and inspiration.

recommendations.title: The Outsider
recommendations.overview: A drama about the less known aspects of the trading activity inside one of the biggest banks in the world - Société Générale. The movie tracks the rise and fall of anonymous trader turned superstar turned escape goat - Jérôme Kerviel - just as the 20

recommendations.title: War of the Buttons
recommendations.overview: Occupied France; Lebrac leads a play war between two rival kid gangs, but a girl he likes, who's Jewish, is in danger of being discovered by local Nazi sympathisers. Lebrac and the village must now respond to the reality of what's happening.

recommendations.title: On the Waterfront
recommendations.overview: A prizefighter-turned-longshoreman with a conscience goes up against labor leaders to expose corruption, extortion, and murder among the union ranks.

recommendations.title: Moulin Rouge!
recommendations.overview: A celebration of love and creative inspiration takes place in the infamous, gaudy and glamorous Parisian nightclub, at the cusp of the 20th century. A young poet, who is plunged into the heady world of Moulin Rouge, begins a passionate affair with th

recommendations.title: Pride
recommendations.overview: In 1984, a group of LGBT activists decide to raise money to support the National Union of Mineworkers during their lengthy strike. There is only one problem: the Union seems embarrassed to receive their support.

recommendations.title: In Safe Hands

recommendations.title: Inequality for All
recommendations.overview: Based on Reich's 2010 book Aftershock: The Next Economy and America's Future, the film examines widening income inequality in the United States.  U.S. Labor Secretary Robert Reich tries to raise awareness of the country's widening economic gap. He pu

recommendations.title: As Far As My Feet Will Carry Me
recommendations.overview: The German soldier Clemens Forel - determined to be reunited with his beloved family - makes a dramatic escape through bitter cold winters, desolate landscapes, and life threatening ventures from a Siberian labor camp after World War II. 8000 miles a

recommendations.title: Blue Collar
recommendations.overview: Fed up with mistreatment at the hands of both management and union brass, and coupled with financial hardships on each man's end, three auto assembly line workers hatch a plan to rob a safe at union headquarters.
